mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (user_id, order_no, total_amount, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{orderNo}, #{totalAmount}, #{status})
INSERT INTO order_item (order_no, product_id, quantity, unit_price) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, #{unitPrice})

INSERT INTO order_item (order_no, product_id, quantity, unit_price) VALUES
(#{item.orderNo}, #{item.productId}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.unitPrice})
mapper.select: SELECT order_no, total_amount, status FROM orders WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: update orders set status = 1 where order_no = #{orderNo} and status = 0 and user_id = #{userId}
update orders set status = 2 where order_no = #{orderNo}
update shopping_cart set quantity = quantity + #{quantity} where user_id = #{userId} and product_id = #{productId}
